name: Generate 3
description: Through-zero oscillator with pitch tracking, phase modulation, reset and flip sync, and three harmonic channels that can be mixed or modulated independently. The same core runs as an audio VCO or a slow through-zero modulation source.

controls.name: Frequency Range
controls.description: Switches between audio-rate VCO and low-frequency VCLFO operation.
controls.detail: AUDIO: 22 Hz to 22 kHz · LOW: 2.8 mHz to 180 Hz

controls.name: Coarse Frequency
controls.detail: audio range spans 22 Hz to 22 kHz with Fine centered

controls.name: Fine Frequency
controls.description: Adds a narrow offset around Coarse frequency.
controls.detail: about 5% of coarse range · 6 semitones in audio mode

controls.name: Through-Zero FM
controls.description: Sets the depth and polarity of the through-zero FM path when no external cable is patched.
controls.detail: 0 V stops the core · negative depth runs the oscillator backwards

controls.name: Bias
controls.description: Adds a +5 V offset to the TZ FM path.
controls.detail: off = through-zero FM · on = normal linear FM bias

controls.name: AC
controls.description: AC-couples the TZ FM input to remove DC offsets from the modulator.
controls.detail: blocks DC and very low frequency content

controls.name: Exponential FM
controls.description: Sets the depth and polarity of the exponential FM path.
controls.detail: centre = zero · clockwise = positive · counterclockwise = negative

controls.name: Phase
controls.description: Sets manual phase offset or the depth of external phase modulation.

controls.name: Fundamental
controls.description: Sets the level and polarity of the fundamental harmonic channel.
controls.detail: center = off · max = normal · min = inverted

controls.name: Even
controls.description: Sets the level and polarity of the even-harmonic channel.

controls.name: Odd
controls.description: Sets the level and polarity of the odd-harmonic channel.

controls.name: V/Oct Trimmer
controls.detail: factory calibrated · accessible from the front

inputs.name: RESET
inputs.description: Hard sync input that resets the triangle core to 0 V on a rising edge.

inputs.name: FLIP
inputs.description: Soft sync input that flips triangle direction on a rising edge.

inputs.name: Fundamental CV
inputs.description: CV over the fundamental harmonic channel.

inputs.name: Even CV
inputs.description: CV over the even harmonic channel.

inputs.name: Odd CV
inputs.description: CV over the odd harmonic channel.

outputs.name: Core Output
outputs.description: Triangle core output, one octave below the fundamental output.

outputs.name: Even Output
outputs.description: Even-harmonic output at twice the core frequency.

outputs.name: Odd Output
outputs.description: Odd-harmonic output built from the odd partials above the fundamental.

outputs.name: Full Output
outputs.description: Mix of the three harmonic channels.

behaviors.name: Through-zero FM
behaviors.description: The oscillator can run through zero into negative frequencies. Deep modulation stays pitch-stable because the core changes direction instead of simply drifting sharp.

behaviors.name: Phase modulation
behaviors.description: Continuous phase movement creates FM-like timbre without changing the core frequency. The same phase control also shifts how the sync inputs strike the waveform.

behaviors.name: Hard and soft sync
behaviors.description: RESET hard-syncs the core by forcing it back to 0 V. FLIP soft-syncs by reversing triangle direction, which keeps more of the waveform edge shape intact.

behaviors.name: Additive harmonic shaping
behaviors.description: The three harmonic channels can be mixed into classic or complex waveforms. Ring-style amplitude modulation on each channel splits harmonics further and produces hollow, metallic spectra.

behaviors.name: Low range as VCLFO
behaviors.description: The same core becomes a slow through-zero modulation source. The harmonic outputs still move, so the module works as a multi-output low-frequency function generator.

behaviors.name: Audio range calibration
behaviors.description: The front-panel trim lets the oscillator be calibrated without removing it from the rack. In audio mode, the core tracks pitch cleanly across a wide range.

behaviors.name: Core one octave down
behaviors.description: The core output is always one octave below the fundamental output. That makes it a useful sub-octave source or a clean reference for modulation patches.

patchIdeas.name: Through-zero lead
patchIdeas.patch: Audio range engaged · Sequencer pitch into V/OCT · LFO into TZ FM with Bias off · Fundamental and Odd mixed for a thin lead that stays stable under deep modulation.
patchIdeas.diagram:
Generate 3:
* Range: AUDIO
* Bias: off
* AC: off
* TZ FM: moderate
* Fundamental: noon
* Even: low
* Odd: noon

Sequencer:
LFO:
VCA:
Output:

- Sequencer (Pitch) p> Generate 3 (V/OCT)
- LFO (Out) >> Generate 3 (TZ FM)
- Generate 3 (Full Output) -> VCA (In)
- Envelope (Out) >> VCA (CV)
- VCA (Out) -> Output (In)

patchIdeas.name: Additive organ
patchIdeas.patch: Fundamental, Even, and Odd are balanced into a stacked organ tone · slight Exponential FM adds motion · Core Output can reinforce the bottom octave for weight.
patchIdeas.diagram:
Generate 3:
* Range: AUDIO
* Fundamental: noon
* Even: noon
* Odd: noon

Mixer:
Output:

- Generate 3 (Fundamental Output) -> Mixer (In 1)
- Generate 3 (Even Output) -> Mixer (In 2)
- Generate 3 (Odd Output) -> Mixer (In 3)
- Generate 3 (Core Output) -> Mixer (In 4)
- Mixer (Out) -> Output (In)

patchIdeas.name: Phase-wash drone
patchIdeas.patch: Low range with slow phase CV · Bias on for linear FM style control · Fundamental and Even mixed unevenly · the phase motion shifts perceived pitch while the core frequency stays fixed.
patchIdeas.diagram:
Generate 3:
* Range: LOW
* Bias: on
* AC: on
* Phase: noon
* Fundamental: high
* Even: medium
* Odd: low

LFO:
Output:

- LFO (Out) >> Generate 3 (PHASE)
- Generate 3 (Full Output) -> Output (In)

patchIdeas.name: Sync lead
patchIdeas.patch: Sequencer pitch into V/OCT · hard sync from a second oscillator into RESET · Flip input available for softer sync edges · the two sync paths carve different harmonic attacks without changing the melodic line.
patchIdeas.diagram:
Generate 3:
* Range: AUDIO
* Bias: off
* AC: on

Sequencer:
Mod VCO:
VCA:
Output:

- Sequencer (Pitch) p> Generate 3 (V/OCT)
- Mod VCO (Out) t> Generate 3 (RESET)
- Generate 3 (Full Output) -> VCA (In)
- Envelope (Out) >> VCA (CV)
- VCA (Out) -> Output (In)

patchIdeas.name: Low-frequency mod bank
patchIdeas.patch: Low range with all three harmonic channels exposed · each output drives a different destination · one module becomes a three-voice modulation source instead of a single LFO.
patchIdeas.diagram:
Generate 3:
* Range: LOW
* Fundamental: high
* Even: medium
* Odd: medium

Filter:
VCA:
Output:

- Generate 3 (Fundamental Output) >> Filter (Cutoff)
- Generate 3 (Even Output) >> VCA (CV)
- Generate 3 (Odd Output) >> Output (Pan CV)
- Generate 3 (Full Output) -> Output (In)
